const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73317900 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg --files data/cases/scotus/73317900 | sort && find data/cases/scotus/73317900 -maxdepth 6 -type f -printf '%p\\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml && sed -n '1,320p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/snapshots/2026-07-17.json && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/documents/documents.json && wc -l -w -c data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/documents/*.txt && sed -n '1,260p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/documents/questions-presented.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,760p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/scotus/73317900/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -A45 -B5 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|Response|Third Circuit|paid\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 420","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -A90 -B5 \"salience band|Salience|fee class|Paid|response requested|requested a response\" metrics/statpack.md metrics/statpack.json | head -n 500","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '130,320p' metrics/statpack.md && jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") or has(\"fee_class\") or has(\"salience\"))' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 300","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition gvr --era 2020s --limit 8","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ && git status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73317900/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"mkdir -p data/cases/scotus/73317900/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T214313Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":1000});
